column2:
T2_What are the TOP THREE (by area covered) distinct colors on the dragonfly?  

If there are fewer than three colors on the dragonfly,
select only the number of colors you see.

Colors on the body, head, or eyes count - do not include colors of the wings, limbs, or body hairs. 

"Shiny" portions of non-white colors don't count as white - likewise "shadowed" portions which are often under insects don't count as black.

See "Need some help with this task?" below the color options for details and examples. _1
